purpose: Provide the opaque product identity required by wishlist mutations without replacing current catalog/detail contracts.
success_outcome: Both product surfaces expose canonical product IDs and retain all existing catalog/detail semantics.
anti_goals: Do not change handles or variant identity.

success_checks: Catalog and detail add opaque canonical product ID.
Existing FT-001/FT-002 behavior and smoke gates remain unchanged.

stop_conditions: Canonical product ID is unavailable through existing query results.
Additive field causes a breaking catalog/detail contract change.
Implementation requires client-derived identity from handle/SKU/title.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify TASK-036 before closure; T2 feature completion later requires feature-level red verification.
